info.title: media_engine
info.description: Universal media-processing engine — typed artifacts, composable operations, pluggable backends.

schema.title: Response List Jobs Endpoint Jobs Get

get.description:
Paginated artifact list, newest first.

Offset-based pagination: pass ``?offset=<n>&limit=<m>`` to walk a
large cache page by page. We over-fetch by one row to detect
whether there's a next page without a separate COUNT query — if
we get back ``limit + 1`` rows, the surplus is dropped from the
response and the client knows to call again with
``offset = current_offset + limit``.

schema.title: Response Get Artifact Endpoint Artifacts  Artifact Id  Get
Response Get Artifact Lineage Artifacts  Artifact Id  Lineage Get
Response List Profiles Endpoint Profiles Get

post.description:
Persist a user-supplied profile under ``{config_dir}/profiles/``.

The accepted body is a validated profile model — invalid YAML never
reaches the disk. The profile name is restricted to kebab-case
(lowercase, digits, ``-``, ``_``; 1–64 chars) so it can't escape
the profiles directory through path-traversal segments like
``../../etc/passwd``.

schema.title: Response Get Profile Endpoint Profiles  Name  Get
Response List Operations Endpoint Operations Get
Response List Backends Endpoint Backends Get
Response List Tokens Endpoint Tokens Get

ApiTokenInfo.title: ApiTokenInfo
ApiTokenInfo.description: Public projection of an API token row (no hash, no secret).

GraphNodeSpec.title: GraphNodeSpec
GraphNodeSpec.description: One op invocation in a pipeline-profile graph.

InputSpec.title: InputSpec
InputSpec.description: A named source artifact this profile expects at run time.

Job.title: Job
Job.description:
REST job — one async unit of work submitted via the API.

A job wraps either a single op (``POST /run``) or a compiled pipeline
(``POST /pipelines``). The row is created in ``pending`` immediately on
submission so the client always has an id to poll; the background
runner flips it to ``running`` and finally to ``completed`` /
``failed`` / ``cancelled``.

OperationRunRef.title: OperationRunRef
OperationRunRef.description: Sliver of a recorded operation run; what produced an artifact.

PipelineProfile.title: PipelineProfile
PipelineProfile.description: ``kind: pipeline`` — explicit DAG of op invocations.

PipelineRequest.title: PipelineRequest
PipelineRequest.description:
Submit a pipeline by name (server-known profile) OR by inline YAML.

Exactly one of ``profile_name`` / ``pipeline_yaml`` must be supplied;
``sources`` maps the profile's declared input names to artifact ids
already in the cache.

PromptProfile.title: PromptProfile
PromptProfile.description:
``kind: prompt`` — markdown frontmatter shorthand for a single VLM/LLM
op call. The op-call body comes from the markdown body of the file.

The full op + backend choice still live in the Engine; the prompt profile
just supplies the system prompt + default op + default backend + optional
output schema.
